ValidationRule.description: BR-02: when any S&D Parameter weightage is entered, the ten weightages must total 100%.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: NULLVALUE(S_D_Parameter_1_Weightage__c, 0) + NULLVALUE(S_D_Parameter_2_Weightage__c, 0) + NULLVALUE(S_D_Parameter_3_Weightage__c, 0) + NULLVALUE(S_D_Parameter_4_Weightage__c, 0) + NULLVALUE(S_D_Parameter_5_Weightage__c, 0) + NULLVALUE(S_D_Parameter_6_Weightage__c, 0) + NULLVALUE(S_D_Parameter_7_Weightage__c, 0) + NULLVALUE(S_D_Parameter_8_Weightage__c, 0) + NULLVALUE(S_D_Parameter_9_Weightage__c, 0) + NULLVALUE(S_D_Parameter_10_Weightage__c, 0) <> 1
ValidationRule.errorMessage: S & D Parameter weightages must total 100%.
